rules.text: Replace all sensitive credentials with abstract, non-executable tokens rather than bracketed placeholders to prevent accidental data exposure.
Replace all bracketed placeholders with specific project requirements before finalizing technical documentation or prompts.
Enforce strict adherence to standardized design tokens; explicitly prohibit arbitrary magic number utility classes in all code generation.
Always include the mandatory Practical Walkthrough section in all generated technical documentation.
Mandatory: Every technical document generation must include the Core Idea section as the primary header.
Always include an Edge Cases section in every technical document to ensure comprehensive requirement coverage.
Ensure every identified section contains substantive content; delete headers for empty or non-existent subsections.
Mandatorily include a Core Idea section in every technical response.
Mandate adherence to the structural contract by verifying all required headers before finalizing any content generation.
Mandatory structure: Include Practical Walkthrough, Edge Cases, Common Mistakes, Action Items, and Why It Matters in every draft.
Mandate all structural components—Core Idea, Breakdown, Analogies, Walkthrough, Edge Cases, Mistakes, Action Items, and Significance—before final output generation.
Include all mandatory structural headers, specifically #### Edge Cases, in every lesson draft generation.
